name: Salmonella typhi ty2 vi polysaccharide antigen
description: Salmonella typhi ty2 vi polysaccharide antigen is a vaccine that is administered intramuscularly. It is an active immunization for the prevention of typhoid fever caused by S typhi and is approved for use in persons two years of age or older. The vaccine contains the purified cell surface Vi polysaccharide extracted from *Salmonella enterica* serovar *Typhi, S typhi Ty2* strain. The bacterial culture is inactivated in the medium with the capsular polysaccharides precipated from the solution.
